description: A candid color photograph taken outdoors on a sunny day on the South Lawn of the White House (green grass, trees, and a corner of the White House visible in the background; staff in suits stand around). President Donald Trump, at right in a dark navy suit, white shirt, and blue tie, grins broadly with both arms raised and fists clenched. Around him a group of smiling teenagers, several wearing matching navy t-shirts with the round Presidential Fitness Test or President's Council seal, hold the same pose; a Black teen in a white t-shirt at center and other youths laugh. It is an event photo (the tweet caption is 'Trump Dance Training on the South Lawn') with no added on-image text, slogans, or graphic overlays.
